metadata.task_title: Save a chart from Excel as an image and insert into PowerPoint
metadata.instruction: Insert the bar chart visualization from Task ID 63.xlsx into PowerPoint Task ID 63.pptx, both in Documents > Task 63 Folder.
metadata.context: I want my data visualized in a presentation.
